Nucleolus_Subregions.function_represented: Granular, dense fibrillar, fibrillar-center, and NOR-contact elements represent ribosomal RNA production and ribosomal subunit assembly.
misconceptions_avoided: The nucleolus is not surrounded by a membrane.
NOR contacts are shown as chromatin-associated contact arcs, not as a separate organelle boundary.
Condensed mitotic chromosomes were not created in this phase.
remaining_accuracy_risks: Gold NOR contacts are stylized for teaching visibility.
Subregion scale is illustrative rather than molecular.
